# pexip_infinity_scheduled_scaling (Resource)

Manages a scheduled scaling policy with the Infinity service. Scheduled scaling policies automatically add or remove VM instances based on time-based schedules, helping optimize resource utilization for predictable workload patterns.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_scheduled_scaling" "example" {
  policy_name         = "Peak Hours Scaling"
  policy_type         = "TeamsConnectorScaling"
  resource_identifier = pexip_infinity_teams_proxy.example.id
  start_date          = "2024-01-01"
  time_from           = "08:00:00"
  time_to             = "18:00:00"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `policy_name` (String) The name of the scheduled scaling policy. Maximum length: 100 characters.
- `policy_type` (String) The type of resource to scale. Valid values: TeamsConnectorScaling.
- `resource_identifier` (String) The identifier of the resource group or deployment to scale.
- `start_date` (String) The start date for this scaling policy in YYYY-MM-DD format.
- `time_from` (String) The start time for scaling in HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 09:30:00).
- `time_to` (String) The end time for scaling in HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 17:00:00).

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this scheduled scaling policy is enabled.
- `fri` (Boolean) Whether to apply scaling on Friday.
- `instances_to_add` (Number) The number of instances to add during scaling. Valid range: 0-100.
- `local_timezone` (String) The local timezone for scheduling (e.g., 'America/New_York', 'Europe/London').
- `minutes_in_advance` (Number) The number of minutes in advance of the activation time to begin scaling up the instances. It can take up to 20 minutes to start an instance so this is to allow enough time for all of the requested additional instances to be started up.
- `mon` (Boolean) Whether to apply scaling on Monday.
- `sat` (Boolean) Whether to apply scaling on Saturday.
- `sun` (Boolean) Whether to apply scaling on Sunday.
- `thu` (Boolean) Whether to apply scaling on Thursday.
- `tue` (Boolean) Whether to apply scaling on Tuesday.
- `wed` (Boolean) Whether to apply scaling on Wednesday.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the scheduled scaling policy.
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the scheduled scaling policy
- `updated` (String) The timestamp when this scheduled scaling policy was last updated.
